title: Sign & Auth Key Generator
description: Generate HMAC-SHA256 signature keys and double-base64 Basic Auth credentials for development and configuration.

toast.decodeFailed: Unable to decode the input string

signature.title: Signature Generator
signature.secretKeyHint: Random 32-character hex string, configured as NEXT_PUBLIC_SIGIN in .env or SIGNATURE_SECRET_KEY in gateway config.

basicAuth.title: Basic Auth Key Generator
basicAuth.inputHint: Format: namespace::purpose, e.g. topedu::auth. Used in config.yml auth_basics.
basicAuth.usageHint: Copy the Double Base64 value above into backend config.yml under auth_basics. The Single Base64 is standard HTTP Basic Auth.
